questions.question: What nation's tourist ad said in 1998: "We're 50 Today. (But we don't feel a day over 4,000)"?
What Beatles album spent the longest time atop the charts, at 15 weeks?
questions.answer: Sgt. Pepper's Lonely Hearts Club Band

questions.question: What New Yorker inspired the headline "Teen Fatal Attraction" in 1992?
What color are a zebra's black stripes during the first six months of life?
Who was the first female to run the 100-meter dash in less than 11 seconds, in 1979?
What slogan did Adolph S. Ochs give The New York Times after he eliminated its romantic fiction in 1896?
questions.answer: "All the News That's Fit to Print"
